---
title: "Quarto 2"
author: Alex Liu
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```


```{r}
mpg |>
  ggplot(aes(x = displ, y = hwy, color = class)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(aes(group = 1), method = "loess", color = "black", 
              linetype = "dashed", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(
    title = "Engine Size vs. Highway Fuel Efficiency",
    subtitle = "Larger engines trend toward lower highway MPG, across vehicle classes",
    x = "Engine Displacement (liters)",
    y = "Highway MPG",
    color = "Vehicle Class",
    caption = "Data: ggplot2::mpg"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 17),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40", size = 11),
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```
